mnemonics.title: Linkage Methods
mnemonics.content: SACW - Single, Average, Complete, Ward's (common linkage methods)

mnemonics.title: Single vs Complete Linkage
mnemonics.content: SMin CMax - Single uses Minimum distance, Complete uses Maximum distance

mnemonics.title: Complexity
mnemonics.content: N-Squared Nightmare - Hierarchical clustering has O(n²) complexity

mnemonics.title: Dendrogram Axes
mnemonics.content: VDH - Vertical Distance, Horizontal data points
